params.name: Urashima Taro's Box
params.description:
On Jul 17, 553 AD, Taro Urashima turned into an old man because he opened the jade box.
This treasure box made of jade was a gift from the Dragon King's daughter to Taro Urashima. The kind-hearted Taro Urashima once rescued a sea turtle by accident, so he was rewarded for his good deeds and was guided to the bottom of the sea where the Crystal Palace of the Dragon King is located. There, he received the kind hospitality of the Dragon King's daughter. A few days later, due to his homesickness, …
